use_cases: Form submission and action triggers in web applications
Loading state indicators with integrated spinner during async operations
Toggle between enabled and disabled states for conditional actions
Dark mode compatible button for modern web interfaces
ai_summary: A versatile button component with multiple variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, error, warning), sizes (tiny to large), and shapes (square, circle, rounded). Features dark mode support, loading state with spinner, and disabled state handling. Built with Tailwind CSS classes for flexible styling in React applications.
